title: Governance-charter + data-sharing-agreement + FAIR/CARE checklist templates
context: Adopters of the CDE and consent standards also need governance-layer templates: a governance-charter template for registry oversight, a data-sharing-agreement (DSA) template for inter-registry collaboration, and a FAIR + CARE alignment checklist. These are not patient-facing (medium risk tier), but they depend on the consent model being established first. The governance-conformance checklist validator (govcheck-001) will consume the structure defined here. Depends on rare-cancer-registry-templates-consent-001. Bioethics and maintainer review.
objective: Author the governance toolkit templates (`governance/`) covering: (1) a governance-charter template defining registry oversight, roles, data-use scope, and conflict-of-interest procedures; (2) a data-sharing-agreement (DSA) template with consent-status confirmation, data-use specification (DUO codes), liability, publication rights, and revocation propagation clauses; and (3) a FAIR + CARE alignment checklist that adopters complete before launch, documenting how their registry addresses each FAIR principle and, where applicable, CARE Principles for Indigenous Data Governance.
acceptanceCriteria: Governance-charter template covers: registry purpose, governance roles and responsibilities, data-use scope, conflict-of-interest procedure, and amendment process.

Data-sharing-agreement template covers: parties, data description (no patient data flows to this project), consent-status confirmation clause, DUO data-use specification, liability, publication rights, and revocation/downstream-propagation obligation.

FAIR + CARE checklist enumerates each FAIR principle (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, Reusable) and CARE principle (Collective Benefit, Authority to Control, Responsibility, Ethics) with guidance and a completion field for adopters.
Every template includes the responsibility-boundary notice: adopters own IRB/REC approval, consent, and data custody; Elyos holds nothing.
Templates carry provenance to their source principles (FAIR: Wilkinson et al.; CARE: Global Indigenous Data Alliance); no copyrighted text is reproduced.
output: A `governance/` directory with governance-charter, DSA, and FAIR/CARE checklist templates, committed via PR with bioethics and maintainer sign-off.
